blocks.text: Hovland enters the final round at T12 — eight shots off the pace at the Arnold Palmer Invitational. A Sunday charge won't win it, but every place counts for FedEx Cup standing.
Bodø/Glimt write history: Norway's biggest ever club night arrives Wednesday
